---
name: review-tone
description: Review and improve copy tone across the site
---

Review all user-facing copy in the Michael Systems™ website and ensure it maintains the correct tone:
- Extremely corporate, self-important, and deadpan
- Treats Michael as strategically critical and historically significant
- Avoids being obviously jokey — the humor comes from the gap between tone and content
- Uses jargon consistently: "Michael-centric", "MichaelOps", "Michael alignment", "Michael Governance Framework"

For each section (Hero, About, Metrics, Widgets, Governance, Roadmap, Testimonials, Contact, Footer):
1. Identify any copy that breaks tone or seems too casual/obviously comedic
2. Propose improved copy
3. Apply the improvements
